subcodes.first_line: The divine Call is raised at all times, and the Pen of the Lord moveth throughout the hours of night and day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندای الهی در کل حین مرتفع و قلم ربانی در ساعات لیل و نهار متحرک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
